mapper.select: SELECT MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, AUTHOR_LEVEL, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "MEMBER" ( MEMBER_NO, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PW, MEMBER_TEL, ENROLL_DATE, MEMBER_DEL_FL, AUTHOR_LEVEL, LOGIN_TYPE ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPw}, #{memberTel}, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, 1, 'NORMAL' )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "MEMBER" WHERE MEMBER_TEL = #{tel} AND MEMBER_DEL_FL = 'N'
